import React, { useState } from "react"; import "./PathologyPage.css"; const PathologyPage = () => { const [selected, setSelected] = useState(null); const [search, setSearch] = useState(""); const [showSuggestions, setShowSuggestions] = useState(false); const healthCheckups = [ { id: "hc-std", title: "STD Checkups", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/4140/4140048.png", oldPrice: 2990, price: 1499, discount: "50% Off", tests: [ "HBsAg (ECLIA)", "VDRL Qualitative", "Hepatitis C Virus antibodies (Anti HCV)", "HIV 1 & 2 (screening)", ], reportTime: "12 hours", description: "Essential sexually-transmitted infections panel.", }, { id: "hc-fever", title: "Fever Checkups", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/2704/2704608.png", oldPrice: 1200, price: 699, discount: "42% Off", tests: ["CBC", "CRP", "Malaria (if indicated)", "Urine Routine"], reportTime: "8 hours", description: "Quick fever panel to identify infection markers.", }, { id: "hc-pcod", title: "PCOD Checkups", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/3004/3004613.png", oldPrice: 2100, price: 1199, discount: "43% Off", tests: ["Hormone profile (LH/FSH)", "Prolactin", "TSH"], reportTime: "24 hours", description: "Hormone panel commonly used for PCOD screening.", }, { id: "hc-senior", title: "Senior Citizen Checkups", img: "https://thumbs.dreamstime.com/b/elderly-patient-medical-care-hospital-vector-illustration-doctor-character-take-old-senior-man-blood-pressure-elderly-181606148.jpg", oldPrice: 5999, price: 2999, discount: "50% Off", tests: ["CBC", "LFT", "KFT", "Lipid Profile", "Blood Sugar", "Thyroid"], reportTime: "24–36 hours", description: "Comprehensive package for elderly health monitoring.", }, ]; const healthTests = [ { id: "ht-kft", title: "Kidney Function Test", img: "https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcTuKnc7AGssXykirnVbCB_FZ1kCdwpKqqtmVQ&s", oldPrice: 999, price: 599, discount: "40% Off", tests: ["Serum Creatinine", "Urea", "Electrolytes"], reportTime: "8 hours", description: "Core kidney markers to evaluate renal function.", }, { id: "ht-vitd", title: "Vitamin D, 25-Hydroxy", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/2750/2750686.png", oldPrice: 999, price: 499, discount: "50% Off", tests: ["Vitamin D (25-OH)"], reportTime: "24 hours", description: "Checks vitamin D status — common deficiency screening.", }, { id: "ht-hba1c", title: "HbA1c", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/2170/2170153.png", oldPrice: 699, price: 399, discount: "43% Off", tests: ["HbA1c"], reportTime: "6 hours", description: "Long-term blood glucose control marker.", }, { id: "ht-lipid", title: "Lipid Profile", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/684/684908.png", oldPrice: 1099, price: 599, discount: "45% Off", tests: ["Total Cholesterol", "HDL", "LDL", "Triglycerides"], reportTime: "8 hours", description: "Risk assessment for cardiovascular disease.", }, ]; const fullBodyCheckups = [ { id: "fb-basic", title: "Full Body Checkup - Essential", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/2645/2645874.png", oldPrice: 5399, price: 1599, discount: "70% Off", tests: [ "CBC", "Blood Sugar (Fasting)", "Lipid Profile", "Liver Function Test", "Kidney Function Test", "TSH (Thyroid)", ], reportTime: "24 hours", description: "Core full-body essential package for routine screening.", }, { id: "fb-advanced", title: "Full Body Checkup - Advanced", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/2645/2645874.png", oldPrice: 8499, price: 2699, discount: "68% Off", tests: [ "CBC", "Complete Metabolic Panel", "Lipid Profile", "Thyroid Profile", "Vitamin D", "HbA1c", ], reportTime: "24–36 hours", description: "Bigger panel covering metabolic and endocrine markers.", }, { id: "fb-ultra-male", title: "Ultra Full Body Checkup - Male", img: "https://cdn-icons-png.flaticon.com/512/3048/3048122.png", oldPrice: 34999, price: 11999, discount: "66% Off", tests: [ "Complete blood panels", "Advanced cardiac markers", "Hormone profile", "Vitamin D & B12", "PSA", ], reportTime: "48 hours", description: "Extensive package for in-depth male health screening.", }, ]; const allItems = [...healthCheckups, ...healthTests, ...fullBodyCheckups]; const openDetails = (item) => setSelected(item); const closeDetails = () => setSelected(null); const filteredItems = allItems.filter((item) => item.title.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) ); return (

Pathology — Checkups & Tests

{/* Search Bar */}
{ setSearch(e.target.value); setShowSuggestions(true); }} onFocus={() => setShowSuggestions(true)} onBlur={() => setTimeout(() => setShowSuggestions(false), 150)} /> {/* Suggestion Dropdown */} {showSuggestions && search && filteredItems.length > 0 && (
{filteredItems.map((item) => (
{ openDetails(item); setShowSuggestions(false); setSearch(""); }} > {item.title} ({item.description.split(" ")[0]}…)
))}
)}
{/* Show filtered or all */} {search ? (
{filteredItems.length ? ( filteredItems.map((item) => (
openDetails(item)}>
{item.title}
₹{item.price} ₹{item.oldPrice} {item.discount}
)) ) : (

No results found.

)}
) : ( <> {/* Original category sections remain unchanged */} {/* Popular Health Checkups */}

Popular Health Checkups

{healthCheckups.map((c) => (
openDetails(c)}>
{c.title}
₹{c.price} ₹{c.oldPrice}
))}
{/* Popular Health Tests */}

Popular Health Tests

{healthTests.map((c) => (
openDetails(c)}>
{c.title}
₹{c.price} ₹{c.oldPrice}
))}
{/* Full Body Checkups */}

Full Body Checkups

{fullBodyCheckups.map((c) => (
openDetails(c)}>
{c.title}
₹{c.price} ₹{c.oldPrice} {c.discount}
))}
)} {/* Modal */} {selected && (
e.stopPropagation()}>
{selected.title}
{selected.discount}
₹{selected.oldPrice} ₹{selected.price}

{selected.description}

Tests included
    {selected.tests.map((t, i) => (
  • {t}
    • ))}
Reports: {selected.reportTime} {selected.tests.length} tests
)}
); }; export default PathologyPage;
